Black sacrifices a pawn in order to develop quickly and block White's bishop's attack on f7. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. :1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.Ng5 d5
